nasb.text: He also had Aaron’s sons come near; and Moses put some of the blood on the lobe of their right ear, and on the thumb of their right hand and on the big toe of their right foot. Moses then sprinkled the rest of the blood around on the altar.

esv.text: Then he presented Aaron’s sons, and Moses put some of the blood on the lobes of their right ears and on the thumbs of their right hands and on the big toes of their right feet. And Moses threw the blood against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 又把亞倫的兒子帶來，摩西也把血抹在他們的右耳垂上和右手的大拇指上，以及右腳的大拇趾上；其餘的血則潑在祭壇的四周。

ccb.text: 他又把亚伦的儿子们带来，将一些血抹在他们的右耳垂、右手大拇指和右脚大脚趾上，然后把剩下的血都洒在祭坛四周。
